description_long: This object is a tall, slender potted plant with multiple elongated green stems branching out and supporting clusters of small, star-shaped yellow flowers. The foliage is sparse, with narrow, pointed leaves distributed along the stems. The plant appears to be upright and slightly arching, giving it a natural, wild look. There is no visible pot or container at the base, suggesting the focus is on the plant itself. The flowers are densely packed at the tips of the branches, creating a vibrant yellow canopy. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a wildflower or ornamental garden plant, suitable for decorative use in urban green spaces.
description: A tall, slender potted plant with green stems and clusters of small yellow star-shaped flowers, featuring sparse, narrow leaves and a natural, wild appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plant's upright structure, dense yellow flower clusters, and green stems with sparse leaves.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the arching stems and the elongated profile of the plant, with flowers cascading to one side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the flower clusters and the branching pattern of the stems.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the arching nature of the stems and the distribution of flowers along the top.
